# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.IidChangePointDetector

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Kind: `class`

IScanTransform for IID change point detection. Same as IidSpikeDetector but defaults to martingale alerting and resets martingale on alert.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class IidChangePointDetector : HPD.ML.Abstractions.IScanTransform<HPD.ML.TimeSeries.IidAnomalyState>, HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```

